title: polygala vulgaris var. involutiflora
intro: Polygala vulgaris var. involutiflora, also known as common polygala, is a perennial plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to support the immune system and reduce stress. Polygala vulgaris var. involutiflora is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
